nasb.text: From the outside to the inner gate were chambers for the singers in the inner court, one of which was at the side of the north gate, with its front toward the south, and one at the side of the south gate facing toward the north.

esv.text: On the outside of the inner gateway there were two chambers in the inner court, one at the side of the north gate facing south, the other at the side of the south gate facing north.

cnv.text: 內院的門外有兩間房子：一間在北門旁邊，朝向南面；一間在南門旁邊，朝向北面。

ccb.text: 在内院有歌乐手用的厢房，一间向南，在北门旁，一间向北，在南门旁。
